skills.name: Absolute Protection
skills.description: Enhances the defense abilities of the designated character according to their equipped armor, and ignores a certain number of enemy skill attacks.

effects: Ignores enemy PC skill attacks exceeding current HP (1 time hit through normal attack or skill, buff is removed)
It does not stacks with [Absolute Shield].
If the ally is wearing [Light Armor], 25% reduced damage from magic attacks
If the ally is wearing [Medium Armor], 25% reduced damage from ranged attacks
If the ally is wearing [Heavy Armor], 25% reduced damage from melee attacks
Ignores enemy PC skill attacks exceeding current HP (1 time hit through normal attack or skill, buff is removed)

skills.name: Absolute Shield
skills.description: Grants a shield to the designated ally based on their maximum HP, reducing all incoming skill damage by a fixed amount.

It does not stacks with [Absolute Protection].
